data.name: Emergent Active Perception and Dexterity of Simulated Humanoids from Visual Reinforcement Learning

data.description: Emergent Active Perception and Dexterity of Simulated Humanoids from Visual Reinforcement Learning studies Dexterous Manipulation.
Emergent Active Perception and Dexterity of Simulated Humanoids from Visual Reinforcement Learning discusses Sim-to-Real Transfer.
Emergent Active Perception and Dexterity of Simulated Humanoids from Visual Reinforcement Learning uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
